Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Off Calendar

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustees, To Appoint Successor Trustee & For Fees
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The two following cases were called together: 1)PTR-13-297013 Trust Created under the Will of Vivian Torlakson Goodwin and 2)PTR-13-297014 Trust Created under the Will of John H. Goodwin.

Appearance: Peter Tamases for and with Patricia Goodwin (Respondent/Cross-Petitioner). Gregory O'Keeffe for and with Richard Goodwin (Trustee). Stephen Barbieri for and with Jacquelyn Moyes (Petitioner). Joann Turner (Beneficiary).

Mr. Tamases reported that the parties have reached a fully signed settlement agreement and that he requested to have each party to confirm that they have signed the settlement agreement willingly. Furthermore, he stated that they will not petition to approve the settlement agreement and that they will dismiss the case. The Court is pleased to see the parties have reached a settlement agreement. Ms. Moyes made a statement. Mr. Tamases objected to her stating the terms of the settlement agreement. The Court voir dire Ms. Moyes, Ms. Turner, Ms. Goodwin and Mr. Goodwin with regard to signing the settlement agreement willingly. All parties confirmed. Mr. Tamase, Mr. O'Keeffe and Mr. Barbieri also concurred with the settlement agreement. The Court encouraged all parties to complete and effectuate the settlement courteously. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc in both cases are taken off calendar. The Cross-Petition set for hearing on February 4, 2014 can go off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: Donielle Del Carlo CSR #10476 Phone: 650-954-4706. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustees, To Appoint Successor Trustee & For Fees
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The two following cases were called together: PTR-13-297013 Trust created under the Will of Vivian Torlakson Goodwin and PTR-13-297014 Trust created under the Will of John H. Goodwin.

Appearances: Greg O'Keeffe for and with Richard Goodwin (Trustee of the John Trust and Co-Trustee of the Vivian Trust). Stephen Barbieri for Jacquelyn Moyes (Petitioner). Peter Tamases for and with Patricia Goodwin (Trustee/Beneficiary). Joann Turner (Beneficary of both trusts).

The Court clarified that the two Petitions to Remove Trustee are on calendar today and that the Cross-Petition is set for hearing on February 4, 2014. Mr. O'Keeffe reported that the parties have stipulated to mediation and agreed on a mediator. Mr. Barbieri wanted the Court to order mediation with a return date. The Court indicated that mediation is voluntary and the Court does not order mediation but a return date can be set. The matter was continued to January 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. Joann Turner read a statement in support of the removal of trustee and mediation and with regard to her concerns and request. The Court encouraged parties to participate fully in mediation to find a solution and reach an agreement.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustees, To Appoint Successor Trustee & For Fees
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
